title: Excalibur | Target Dummy support
description: This resource pack redraws the Target Dummy mod in the Excalibur style
body:
This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Target Dummy](https://modrinth.com/mod/mmmmmmmmmmmm) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Credits:**
- Maffhew – Creator of Excalibur
- MehVahdJukaar - Creator of Target Dummy
